name: 禁用不存在的绑定（异常测试）
description: 验证禁用不存在的绑定时的错误处理
descriptionHtml: 验证禁用不存在的绑定时的错误处理
statusTrace:
self = <test_gateway_binding.TestGatewayDeviceBinding object at 0x7fed47bf8a70>
binding_client = <test_jetlinks.common.api_client.GatewayDeviceBindingClient object at 0x7fed45539370>

    @allure.title("禁用不存在的绑定（异常测试）")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    @allure.description("验证禁用不存在的绑定时的错误处理")
    def test_05_disable_nonexistent_binding(self, binding_client):
        """
        测试：禁用不存在的绑定
        """
        fake_id = "nonexistent_binding_9999999"
    
        with allure.step("尝试禁用不存在的绑定并捕获异常"):
            disable_resp = binding_client.disable_binding(fake_id)
            print(disable_resp)
            allure.attach(
                f"捕获到预期异常：{disable_resp['message']}",
                name = "异常信息",
                attachment_type = allure.attachment_type.TEXT
            )
    
            # 验证异常信息包含404
>           assert disable_resp['message'] != 'success'
E           AssertionError: assert 'success' != 'success'

testcase/test_gateway_binding.py:237: AssertionError
